title: the simple origins modpack
description: A simple mod pack that keeps Minecraft close to vanilla, only adding the Origins mod for a fresh way to experience the game
body:
Origins+ Modpack – Over 100 Origins to Transform Your Gameplay

This modpack is centered around the Origins mod, but greatly expanded. It features over 100 unique origins from various addon mods, allowing players to choose from a wide range of custom playstyles, abilities, and challenges. Whether you want to fly, teleport, swim like a fish, or live in the shadows, there's an origin for every kind of player.

Included Features

Over 100 origins from multiple expansion mods

Built-in voice chat (no external setup required)

Lightweight optimization mods to improve performance

Minor quality-of-life improvements that keep the gameplay close to vanilla
